message.content: Please analyze the clockin-app project (a WeChat Mini Program) for improvements in readability, performance, security, and adherence to best practices. The project is located in the clockin-app directory relative to the current working directory. Examine the code structure, JavaScript files, WXML templates, WXSS styles, and any configuration files. Provide specific suggestions for improvements, potential bugs, security issues, performance optimizations, and code quality enhancements. Focus on actionable recommendations that can be implemented to improve the project.

content.text: I'll analyze the clockin-app project to provide comprehensive suggestions for improvements. Let me start by exploring the project structure and examining the key files.

file.content:
<!-- pages/index/index.wxml -->
<view class="page">

  <!-- ══ LARGE TITLE HEADER ══ -->
  <view class="header">
    <view class="header-top">
      <view>
        <text class="header-date">{{headerDate}}</text>
        <text class="header-title">今日习惯</text>
      </view>
      <view class="header-actions">
        <view class="streak-pill" wx:if="{{totalStreak > 0}}">
          <text class="streak-icon">🔥</text>
          <text class="streak-label">{{totalStreak}}</text>
        </view>
        <view class="avatar-btn" bindtap="showProfile">
          <text class="avatar-text">{{userInfo.avatar || '🌟'}}</text>
        </view>
      </view>
    </view>
  </view>

  <!-- ══ ACTIVITY SUMMARY CARD ══ -->
  <view class="section">
    <view class="activity-card card">
      <view class="activity-inner">
        <!-- Ring visual -->
        <view class="ring-wrap">
          <view class="ring-bg">
            <view class="ring-fill" style="--pct: {{todayRate}}; background: conic-gradient({{ringColor}} calc({{todayRate}} * 1%), var(--fill-3) 0);"></view>
          </view>
          <view class="ring-center">
            <text class="ring-num">{{completedCount}}</text>
            <text class="ring-denom">/{{totalHabits}}</text>
          </view>
        </view>
        <!-- Stats -->
        <view class="activity-stats">
          <view class="stat-row">
            <view class="stat-dot" style="background:{{ringColor}};"></view>
            <view class="stat-text">
              <text class="stat-label">今日完成</text>
              <text class="stat-value" style="color:{{ringColor}};">{{completedCount}} 项</text>
            </view>
          </view>
          <view class="stat-divider"></view>
          <view class="stat-row">
            <view class="stat-dot" style="background:var(--green);"></view>
            <view class="stat-text">
              <text class="stat-label">连续打卡</text>
